title: Chitin binding assay using chitin magnetic beads (NEB)
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"UkxXg","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"yHmBM","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"rp6Nj","text":"STEP MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"gbmyR","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":618,"guid":"4101A977341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Chitin Magnetic Beads - 5 ml","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E8036S","url":"https://www.neb.com/E8036","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":2,"name":"New England Biolabs","link":"https://www.neb.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/2.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/2.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":618,"guid":"4101A977341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Chitin Magnetic Beads - 5 ml","mol_weight":0,"sku":"E8036S","url":"https://www.neb.com/E8036","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":2,"name":"New England Biolabs","link":"https://www.neb.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/2.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/2.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Make the following buffer: 1 X CBD Column Binding Buffer %s %s Tris-HCl 20 mM Adjust pH to 8 using HCl (2,42 g/L) NaCl 500 mM (29,22 g/L) EDTA 1 mM (0,292 g/L) Tween-20 0.05% v/v 500 ul/ 1 L Gently mix the beads solution and resuspend thoroughly. Chitin Magnetic Beads - 5 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #E8036S
Aliquot 50 ul of beads solution into a 2 ml microfuge tube
Apply a magnet for 30 seconds to pull the beads to one side. Remove the excess liquid
Wash the beads 3 times with 500 ul of 1x CBD Column Binding Buffer. Apply magnet and remove the liquid.
Load 200-500 ul of cell supernatant with the beads. Note: when making dilutions of the supernatant, dilute in CBD Column Binding Buffer.
Mix thoroughly and incubate for 1 hour at 4°C at constant agitation.
Apply magnet for 30 seconds and remove supernatant with a pipette. Save the supernatant.
Wash beads 3 times with 500 ul of 1x CBD Column Binding Buffer. Apply magnet for 30 seconds and pipette off liquid. Save the wash fractions.
To remove proteins from the beads, boil beads for 5 minutes in 50 ul SDS-Page sample buffer at 95 °C
Run fractions on a protein gel
creator: Robert Hooftman
